Comprehension Excerpts on LaaS/Homocracy—Volume 2


Comprehension Excerpts on LaaS/Homocracy — Volume 2



  1. Ending Power Struggles



🌍 ENDING POWER STRUGGLES

Power has always been a coveted seat. In Democracy, leaders are elected for a term — the office is prestigious, influential, and economically rewarding. In Monarchy and other systems, authority becomes even more desirable.

⚠️ The result?
Power struggles. Coups. Office overstays. Uprisings. Civil wars. Even genocides.

Why? Because power is treated as a privilege to possess — not a service to render.

🔄 What if leadership was normalized?

What if leadership was simply another service in society — like teaching, engineering, farming, or medicine?

This is the idea behind LaaS — Leadership as a Service.

✨ In LaaS, leadership is not a throne.
✨ It is not a status symbol.
✨ It is not an economic advantage.

It is a functional responsibility within a system of mutual provision.

🏛 Introducing Homocracy

LaaS is operationalized through Homocracy (rhymes with Democracy).
It is not LGBTQ-related.

Homocracy simply means:

Governance by equals.

In Homocracy, rulership is vindicated by one clear purpose:

🎯 To manage and distribute resources that support human existence.

Nothing more.
Nothing less.

🧩 The Core Framework

All members of society participate in:

Morshux — Management of Resources that Support Human Existence.

And each person receives their equal:

Porshux — Portion of Resources that Support Human Existence.

Porshux is also known as:

🏡 SCoPS — Self-Contained Personal Space
Everything a person needs to live with dignity.

When everyone has secure provision, power loses its intoxicating grip.

🔁 Rotation or Permanence — Without Conflict

Under LaaS/Homocracy:

✔ Leaders can rotate — without destabilizing society.
✔ Leaders can remain longer — without triggering fear.

Why? Because leadership is no longer a gateway to privilege.

It is simply a role within Morshux.

No elevated class.
No superior entitlement.
No desperation to capture the seat.

🌱 Ending Power-Related Conflicts

When leadership becomes service:

🔥 Coups lose motivation.
🔥 Overstays lose benefit.
🔥 Civil unrest loses fuel.
🔥 Power struggles lose meaning.

Because everyone already has their Porshux.

And everyone has a satisfying role to play.

🤝 Join the Conversation

If LaaS / Homocracy resonates with you and you would like to promote it in your country or community:

📩 Reach out: onkezabahizi@gmail.com

Let’s transform power from possession → to provision.

#LeadershipAsAService #Homocracy #EndPowerStruggles #Morshux #Porshux #SCoPS





  1. Fixing the Broken Financial System



💰 The Broken Financial System — And Its Fixture

History has shown us a painful paradox:

🍊 Food destroyed.
🥔 Crops burned.
🐖 Livestock slaughtered.

…while people were starving.

📉 The Great Depression (1930s — United States)

During the financial collapse of the early 1930s, agricultural prices fell below the cost of harvesting and transportation. Farmers — supported by policy — dumped carloads of oranges, poured kerosene on potatoes, and slaughtered thousands of pigs.

Why? To reduce supply and push prices up.

All this happened while breadlines stretched across cities and hunger marches filled the streets.

Food was abundant.

But it was unaffordable.

🌍 The 2008 Financial Crisis

Again, a paradox.

In parts of the developing world — including India — surplus food rotted in storage while millions could not afford to buy it.

Supply existed.
Access did not.

🦠 COVID-19 Pandemic (2020)

Shutdowns disrupted supply chains globally.

🥛 Milk was dumped.
🥚 Eggs were broken.
🥬 Vegetables were plowed under.

Not because people didn’t need food.

But because markets couldn’t function.

🌾 Indian Famine (1875–1900)

During intense financial pressure and localized drought, grain continued to be exported because global sales were more profitable than feeding local populations.

Profit moved.
People starved.

⚠️ The Pattern

When currency becomes the gatekeeper of survival, life depends on price — not provision.

If you cannot pay, you cannot live with dignity.

That is the fracture.

🔄 The Fixture: LaaS + Homocracy

LaaS — Leadership as a Service
Operationalized through Homocracy — Governance by Equals

Powered by:

💻 Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI)
🔁 A structured mutual-provision trade system

Introducing:

🔄 SerX — Services Exchange

Where the trade means is service, not currency.

Every individual contributes service.
Every individual receives provision.

Life-supporting resources are distributed through structured mutual management.

Currency is relocated to the extra-comfort zone — not the survival zone.

💎 VirCu — Virtual Currency

Money value that lives solely in computers.

It governs comfort.
Not life.

No one’s access to food, shelter, healthcare, or dignity depends on purchasing power.

Survival is guaranteed.
Extra comfort is earned.

🌱 From Scarcity Economics → To Provision Economics

When survival is detached from currency:

🚫 Food is not destroyed to protect price.
🚫 Exports do not override human hunger.
🚫 Supply chain disruptions do not create starvation.

Because provision is primary.

And currency is secondary.

❓ Final Question

What system is broken in your country?

#LaaS #Homocracy #SerX #VirCu #ProvisionEconomy #RethinkFinance





  1. Ending Leaders Assassinations



🛑 Ending Foreign and Local Leaders Assassinations

Throughout human history, strategic leaders who influence national or global policy have often become targets of assassination.

🎯 Sometimes by foreign covert operations.
🎯 Sometimes by the very institutions they represent.

This raises an important question:

❓ Why do such assassinations happen?

And an even more important one:

❓ How can we make leadership safe for everyone?

🌍 A Pattern Across Empires

Global power has shifted repeatedly throughout history:

🏺 Egypt
⚔️ Assyria
🏛 Babylon
👑 Medes & Persia
🛡 Greece
🦅 Rome
🌐 US–UK

Each era saw power struggles, regime changes, wars, and assassinations.

At times it may seem that violence is simply part of human nature.

But we know something deeper:

❤️ Humans are capable of extraordinary love, cooperation, and generosity.

So what drives leaders to eliminate one another?

🔍 The Root Cause

When we isolate the problem, a clear pattern emerges.

It is about survival in a world where:

⚖️ Resources are unevenly distributed
🏛 Governance structures concentrate power
⚔️ Control determines who survives and who doesn't

In such a system:

  • Leaders feel constantly threatened.

  • Rivals attempt coups.

  • Assassinations become tools of regime change.

The more power someone holds…

…the greater their perceived chance of survival.

This vicious cycle has produced:

🔥 Wars
🗡 Assassinations
💔 Genocides
📉 Poverty
📉 Unemployment
📉 Inequality

🔄 The Structural Solution

To end this tragic pattern, two things must happen:

✔ Power must be normalized.
✔ Resources must be distributed fairly across humanity.

This is the vision behind:

✨ LaaS / Homocracy

LaaS — Leadership as a Service
Homocracy — Governance by Equals

This system transforms the meaning of power.

Leadership exists for one purpose only:

🎯 Managing and distributing resources that support human existence.

Nothing more.

Nothing less.

When survival is guaranteed through fair distribution, power no longer determines who lives with dignity.

It becomes a service for mutual provision.

🌐 Designed for a Multipolar World

LaaS/Homocracy can begin in any country or group of countries and gradually scale into a multipolar world federal governance structure.

Its core global institutions include:

🌍 WTSC — World Trade System Consortium
👥 HDN — Human Demography and Nutrition
🏭 CTP — Chain of Transformation and Production
⚖️ IFaSS — International Fair Social System

🏢 Implementing the Vision

Through the vehicle company Laastras (to be established in each country), these institutions are embodied through operational brands:

👥 Jobperon / Chaperon → HDN
📡 eCard Wireless + AORI → CTP
🤝 GetClientele → IFaSS

🌐 Learn more: https://mwambaro.github.io

Government participation would occur through:

🏛 SPLAASM — Special Leadership as a Service Ministry / Department

This structure operationalizes WTSC at the national level.

🌱 A World Without Political Survival Battles

When leadership becomes service and survival is guaranteed:

🚫 Power is no longer a survival weapon.
🚫 Coups lose motivation.
🚫 Assassinations lose strategic value.
🚫 Regime changes no longer require violence.

Because leadership becomes management of shared provision.

Not control over survival.

🤔 Final Reflection

If power no longer determines who survives…

Would leaders still need to eliminate each other?

#LaaS #Homocracy #EndAssassinations #FutureGovernance #SharedHumanity







  1. Fathom Leadership as a Service (LaaS)



🌍 Fathom Leadership as a Service

For most of human history, leadership has been about dominance and control.

⚔️ Empires rose.
⚔️ Kingdoms fell.
⚔️ Wars erupted.
⚔️ Genocides scarred humanity.

The desire to be free and to survive pushed people into uprisings and revolutions.

It is no exaggeration to say:

✒️ History has been written with the ink of blood.

Some argue that dark forces manipulate human conflict. That may be true. But there is another uncomfortable truth:

⚠️ Our social order, governance systems, and economic thinking contain deep structural flaws.

These flaws make our societies vulnerable to both internal collapse and external manipulation.

Fix the structure — and society becomes resilient.

🔎 The Governance Question

Because of centuries of oppression, some people now believe:

❌ Governance itself is the problem.
❌ Authority should always be resisted.

This has produced a rebellious culture that distrusts leadership entirely.

But the real solution is not the absence of governance.

The real solution is correct governance.

✨ The Fixture: LaaS / Homocracy

LaaS — Leadership as a Service
Homocracy — Governance by Equals

LaaS vindicates leadership by reducing it to its sole raison d’être:

🎯 Managing and distributing resources that support human existence.

Nothing more.

Nothing less.

Because our lives depend on shared resources, governance must exist only to ensure their fair management and distribution.

🧠 The Foundational Principle

The system rests on a philosophical truth called:

TAToE — The Absolute Truth of Existence

Existence is governed by free will and mutual respect, not by imposed authority.

This leads to a profound realization:

🌐 Trade is the outermost container of human relations.

If trade is broken, society is broken.

So LaaS/Homocracy focuses on fixing trade itself.

🔄 Two Trade Systems

LaaS/Homocracy introduces two complementary systems:

🔁 SerX — Services Exchange

A system where services themselves become the means of trade.

💎 VirCu — Virtual Currency

A digital value system used for extra comfort, creativity, and personal innovation.

🌱 The Provision Framework

These systems power two essential societal outcomes:

🌍 Morshux

Management of Resources that Support Human Existence

Which yields:

🏡 Porshux

Portion of Resources that Support Human Existence

Also known as:

SCoPS — Self‑Contained Personal Space

Everything a person needs to live with dignity.

Once survival is secured through Porshux, individuals are free to explore creativity in the VirCu extra‑comfort zone.

🛡 Bullet‑Proofing Human Society

By fixing trade and normalizing leadership, LaaS/Homocracy strengthens society against systemic collapse.

It eliminates the root drivers of:

🔥 Wars
🔥 Poverty
🔥 Unemployment
🔥 Inequality
🔥 Political domination

And secures fundamental human liberties.

When leadership becomes service, authority is no longer something to fear.

It becomes a shared mechanism of mutual provision.

🌱 A New Relationship With Governance

Under LaaS/Homocracy:

✔ Leadership serves provision
✔ Resources support dignity
✔ Trade sustains society

No more domination.

No more survival battles.

Only mutual human flourishing.

#FathomTheFuture

#LaaS #Homocracy #TAToE #SerX #VirCu #Morshux #Porshux #SCoPS #FutureGovernance #ProvisionEconomy







  1. When Power Loses Teeth



⏳ “We Would Not Care How Long You Stay in Power”

In today’s political world, staying in power for too long is often seen as a tragedy.

Why?

Because power positions are:

👑 Prestigious
💰 Economically enriching
🏛 Symbols of privilege

Those in power can quickly effect major change — and there are many things in society that people believe must change.

So societies created a safeguard:

🔁 Rotation of power.

Short terms are meant to give many people the chance to reform society.

But this solution created its own problems.

⚔️ The Endless Competition for Power

Election cycles often become perfunctory battles for control.

Candidates go to extremes to secure the position.

The result?

💸 Billions spent on elections
⚔️ Political polarization
🔥 Uprisings and unrest
🪖 Wars fought in the name of regime change

Power becomes something people fight desperately to obtain.

👑 The Opposite Argument

Others believe long-term leadership is better.

Why?

Because leaders who remain longer:

🧠 Understand problems more deeply
📈 Can implement long-term reforms
🏛 Provide continuity in governance

This is why some people still prefer Monarchies over Republics.

But both systems still revolve around the same problem:

⚠️ Power is concentrated in a few hands.

🤔 Imagine Something Different

What if power itself were distributed across society?

What if every individual could effect meaningful change from their own function — whether administrative, technical, agricultural, or creative?

Would we still worry about how long someone stays in office?

Certainly not.

✨ The Idea: LaaS / Homocracy

LaaS — Leadership as a Service
Homocracy — Governance by Equals

In this system, power positions become normal service roles — no more extraordinary than the person who plows land every day.

Through:

🌍 Morshux — Management of Resources that Support Human Existence

and

🔁 SerX — Services Exchange

Everyone participates in shaping society.

Everyone contributes leadership through their function.

🏛 The True Role of Government

Government becomes simply the institution that:

🛡 Protects the system
⚙️ Administers shared resources
🤝 Serves mutual provision

Not a throne.

Not a prize.

Just another service role.

🌱 When Power Loses Its Teeth

When power is normalized:

🚫 Elections no longer require extreme spending
🚫 Uprisings lose motivation
🚫 Wars for regime change lose meaning

Because survival and dignity are no longer tied to capturing power.

Whether someone stays in leadership 5 years or 50 years becomes irrelevant.

⚡ Power has lost its devouring teeth.

❓ Final Question

Do you think LaaS / Homocracy is just theory?

🔎 Search keyword: Laastras

#LaaS #Homocracy #SerX #Morshux #FutureGovernance #LeadershipAsAService #Laastras





  1. A Reform Based on Principles of Good



📜 A Historical Reform That Lasted — And Why It Worked

Many reforms in history tried to replace rulers.

Few tried to fix the system itself.

One reform that truly targeted the system — and still shapes the world today — was the creation of the modern Civil Service system.

🏛 The Civil Service Reform

For centuries, government positions in many countries were given through:

👑 Family privilege
🤝 Political loyalty
💰 Corruption

But reforms beginning in imperial China’s merit examination system and later spreading through modern civil service reforms in the 19th century changed this.

Instead of rewarding loyalty to individuals, the reform created:

📚 Merit-based selection
⚖️ Standardized administration
🏛 Institutions stronger than individuals

This reform lasted because it changed the structure, not just the leaders.

🔎 The Deeper Lesson

For reform to last, it must confront the root problem of human history:

⚠️ Uneven distribution of resources.

From ancient empires to modern nations, conflicts have repeatedly emerged because survival often depends on who controls resources.

Lasting reform must therefore redesign how resources are managed and shared.

⚙️ Our Technological Moment

Humanity now possesses tools never before available:

💻 Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI)
📊 Advanced Data Governance
🌐 Global communication networks

These technologies allow societies to manage resources with unprecedented efficiency and transparency.

But technology alone is not enough.

🌌 The Grand Scheme of Things

Across cultures and civilizations, billions of people have believed in superhuman forces of Good and Evil.

Some call it:

✨ God
🌌 The Starter of the Universe
📖 Truth

Whatever the name, many recognize that existence follows a grander scheme.

Without that larger meaning, everything would become devoid of purpose.

So any reform meant to last must align with the Grand Scheme of Things.

🌍 Introducing LaaS / Homocracy

LaaS — Leadership as a Service
Homocracy — Governance by Equals

This model builds governance on principles traditionally associated with Good:

❤️ Love
⚖️ Equality
🕊 Justice

It begins with a simple truth:

🌱 The resources that sustain human life are given — therefore they must be shared.

🧩 The Implementation: Laastras

Using modern technologies such as Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) and Data Governance, a pilot start‑up ecosystem called Laastras is designed to operationalize this vision.

It includes four major platforms:

👥 Jobperon / Chaperon
→ Human Demography and Nutrition (HDN)

🤝 GetClientele
→ International Fair Social System (IFaSS)

🏭 AORI
→ Chain of Transformation and Production (CTP)

📡 eCard Wireless
→ World Trade System Consortium (WTSC)

🌐 Learn more: https://mwambaro.github.io

🌐 Toward a New Global Structure

Together, these platforms embody four foundational institutions for a new multi‑polar world order.

The long‑term vision:

🌍 An equality‑centered World Federal Government

Where the safety belt of society is:

🤝 Mutual provision for all humanity.

🌱 The Real Test of Reform

A reform lasts when it:

✔ Fixes the system
✔ Aligns with truth and justice
✔ Uses the best tools of its era

The question for our time is simple:

Are we ready for the next system-level reform?

#LaaS #Homocracy #Laastras #HDN #IFaSS #CTP #WTSC #FutureGovernance #SharedResources



  1. Cash — Digital or Physical — Is not Freedom



LaaS/Homocracy Is Our Safety Belt — Not Cash (Eye on Switzerland)

On March 8, 2026, Swiss voters made an important decision about the future of money.

🗳 45.61% voted for the "Cash is Freedom" initiative — but it was rejected.
🗳 73.4% approved the government’s counter‑proposal.

The result:

💵 The Swiss National Bank must ensure sufficient cash supply.
🇨🇭 The Swiss franc is constitutionally recognized as the national currency.
📜 Any future attempt to remove cash would require a mandatory referendum.

This shows something important: many citizens still trust cash as a safeguard of freedom.

But here is the deeper question.

🤔 Is Cash Really the Safety Belt?

Even with abundant cash, the core problems remain:

⚖️ Inequality
📉 Poverty
⚔️ Conflicts
📉 Unemployment
🔐 Freedom entanglement

Why?

Because the real issue is not cash or digital money.

The real issue is the structure of governance and the financial system built around competition and concentrated power.

Yes, digital money could easily become a tool for control if the governance structure is broken.

But the true solution is not to fight technology.

It is to fix governance itself.

🌍 The Structural Solution

✨ LaaS / Homocracy

LaaS — Leadership as a Service
Homocracy — Governance by Equals

In this system, governance has one single purpose:

🎯 Mutual provision for all.

Nothing more.

Nothing less.

🔄 How It Works

At the center is:

🌍 Morshux
Management of Resources that Support Human Existence

Within Morshux operates:

🔁 SerX — Services Exchange

A trade system where service becomes the primary means of exchange.

From this system comes:

🏡 Porshux
Portion of Resources that Support Human Existence

Meaning:

✨ Everything a person needs to live with dignity is guaranteed.

In return, each person contributes service within the Morshux ecosystem.

This right to dignified existence becomes constitutionally protected.

🚀 Making It Practical: Laastras

A start‑up ecosystem called Laastras is designed to make this system operational.

One of its engines is:

🔧 AORI — Acquire or Integrate

Using the Mergers & Acquisitions (M&A) model to shape the global Morshux network and establish the SerX trade system.

🌐 Learn more or become a Co‑Founder:

https://mwambaro.github.io

🛡 The Real Safety Belt

Cash cannot guarantee freedom.

Digital money cannot guarantee freedom.

Only a fair governance structure can.

And that structure is:

🌍 Homocracy — Governance by Equals.

Because when mutual provision is guaranteed, freedom no longer depends on money.

#LaaS #Homocracy #SerX #Morshux #Porshux #Laastras #FutureGovernance #MutualProvision #DigitalEconomy #EconomicJustice





  1. Efficiency in LaaS/Homocracy



⚙️ Efficiency Maintained in LaaS / Homocracy

A common question arises:

🤔 If everyone is a leader in LaaS / Homocracy… does that mean chaos?

Absolutely not.

🏛 Structure Still Matters

LaaS — Leadership as a Service is reflected in:

🌍 Homocracy — Governance by Equals

But let’s clarify something crucial:

❗ Equality does NOT mean the absence of hierarchy.
❗ It does NOT mean everyone becomes a ruler.
❗ It does NOT mean everyone holds administrative office.

The efficient hierarchical structure known in Democracy is maintained.

🎯 What Actually Changes?

Only one thing is constitutionally redefined:

The raison d’être of governance

➡️ Managing and distributing resources that support human existence
➡️ Also called: Mutual Provision

That’s it.

Everything else — structure, administration, coordination — remains optimized for efficiency.

⚖️ Where Equality Truly Lies

Equality in LaaS / Homocracy means:

🔁 Power positions are normalized into services

So:

👨‍💼 Administrative roles
🛠 Technical roles
🌾 Menial roles

All carry equal value within the system of provision.

No inflated privilege.

No superior entitlement.

🔒 The Constitutional Anchor

At the core lies an immutable constitutional principle:

🏡 SCoPS — Self-Contained Personal Space

👉 Everything one needs to live with dignity must be guaranteed.

This becomes the sole purpose of governance.

No matter how many future amendments are made:

⚖️ Power remains normalized
🪶 Power remains emaciated
🌫 Power remains dull

Yet still:

⚙️ Highly efficient in delivering mutual provision.

💻 Powered by Modern Systems

Efficiency is amplified through:

💻 Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI)
📊 Data Governance

These tools ensure operations are:

⚡ Swift
⏱ On time
🎯 Precise

🚀 The Bridge: Laastras

The transition is made practical through:

🏢 Laastras — the vehicle start-up of LaaS / Homocracy

With its engine:

🔧 AORI — Acquire or Integrate

Using Mergers & Acquisitions (M&A) to:

🤝 Fuse private and public sectors
🌍 Build the Morshux ecosystem
🔁 Establish the SerX trade system

⏳ The Window Is Open

The opportunity to participate is now.

🌍 Become a Co-Founder representing your country before the window closes.

👉 Visit: https://mwambaro.github.io
📩 Or write: onkezabahizi@gmail.com

🌱 Final Thought

Efficiency was never the problem.

Purpose was.

Fix the purpose — and efficiency becomes a force for universal human dignity.

  1. No Political Partisanship



🌍 Applying LaaS / Homocracy in Your Country

A common question is:

🤔 Why not start a political party or run for presidency?

It sounds logical… but strategically, we chose a different path.

🚫 Why Not Political Partisanship?

1️⃣ Avoid Fueling the Problem

Politics today often thrives on:

⚔️ Opposition
🔥 Conflict
⚠️ Instability
🪖 Even war

Entering that space risks reinforcing the very issues we aim to solve.

2️⃣ The System Absorbs You

The current political structure is powerful.

Once inside:

🔄 You adapt to it
📉 Your flexibility reduces
🚧 Real systemic change becomes difficult

We deeply respect those working within the system — and trust they will do what they can.

But transformational change requires a different approach.

3️⃣ The Bigger Vision

LaaS / Homocracy is not just national.

🌐 It envisions an equality-centered World Federal Government

Where:

🌱 Every human benefits from planetary resources

Operating within current political systems could limit this global mission.

🤝 Strategic Cooperation

We look toward collaboration — not confrontation.

🌍 International bodies like:

  • United Nations (UN)

  • European Union (EU)

  • African Union (AU)

  • Commonwealth of Nations

Can eventually:

✔ Support reforms
✔ Encourage adoption
✔ Help establish:

🏛 SPLAASM

Special Leadership as a Service Ministry / Department

A global network of such institutions can help manage and oversee the LaaS/Homocracy World Order.

🚀 The Preferred Strategy

Instead of politics, we build:

🏢 Laastras

“Leadership as a Service Trade System”

A private-sector vehicle that:

✨ Operationalizes LaaS — Leadership as a Service
🌍 Implements Homocracy — Governance by Equals

This approach:

🤝 Bridges public and private sectors
⚙️ Builds systems before politics
🌱 Creates real, scalable impact

🌱 Your Role Starts Now

To help establish LaaS / Homocracy in your country and eliminate:

🚫 War
🚫 Poverty
🚫 Inequality

  1. Laastras Theory of Change



🌍 LaaS / Homocracy — Theory of Change

What does it take to transform the world sustainably?

A Theory of Change gives us the blueprint:

🧩 Identify needs
⚙️ Define inputs
🔄 Map processes
📈 Track outcomes
🎯 Achieve long-term impact

Let’s break down how LaaS / Homocracy delivers systemic transformation.

⚠️ The Core Problem

Humanity’s biggest challenge remains:

⚖️ Uneven distribution of life-supporting resources

Leading to:

🔥 Poverty
🔥 Inequality
🔥 Unemployment
🔥 Conflict
🔥 Climate vulnerability

🧩 Inputs

LaaS / Homocracy begins with:

🌱 Life-supporting resources
👥 Gender-inclusive human capital (everyone participates equally)

🔄 The Process

These inputs are processed through a service-centered trade system:

🔁 SerX — Services Exchange

Where:

➡️ Your service in Morshux (Management of Resources that Support Human Existence)
➡️ Yields your:

🏡 Porshux — Portion of Resources that Support Human Existence

Also known as:

✨ SCoPS — Self-Contained Personal Space
Everything needed to live with dignity.

💎 Above SerX: Innovation Layer

💻 VirCu — Virtual Currency

A secondary system where individuals:

🎨 Express creativity
🚀 Generate extra comfort
📈 Innovate beyond basic provision

🏗 Implementation Engine: Laastras

The system is operationalized through Laastras, a 4-platform ecosystem:

👥 Jobperon / Chaperon → HDN

AI-powered job matching + social support (housing, meals, training)

🤝 GetClientele → IFaSS

Smart marketplace navigation + vendor visibility + analytics

🏭 AORI → CTP

M&A-driven integration of individuals, companies, and government into SerX

📡 eCard Wireless → WTSC

Universal digital identity + payments + connectivity in one card

🌱 Intermediate Outcomes

✔ Fusion of public + private sectors
✔ Everyone becomes a leader through their role
✔ Efficient, service-driven governance system
✔ Gender-inclusive participation at all levels

🌍 Most importantly:

People collectively take ownership of global threats like:

🌡 Climate change — driving coordinated action and resource preservation

🎯 Final Outcome

A world where:

🤝 Mutual provision is guaranteed
⚖️ Equality is structural
🛡 Dignity is secured for all
🌱 Sustainability is collective

🔍 Key Assumptions

1️⃣ M&A Integration (AORI)

📊 Confidence: 7/10
✔ Evidence: With awareness + partnerships, adoption grows

3️⃣ Global Cooperation (UN Countries)

📊 Confidence: 5/10
❗ Evidence: Still emerging

💡 The Insight

When service replaces currency as the foundation of survival:

🔄 Society reorganizes around provision
🛡 Systems become resilient
🌍 Humanity moves as one

🚀 Final Thought

This is not just a theory.

It is a blueprint for a livable future.

#LaaS #Homocracy #TheoryOfChange #SerX #VirCu #Morshux #Porshux #SCoPS #Laastras #ClimateAction #GenderEquality #FutureGovernance







  1. Long-term Thinking



🛡️ Long-term Support System

Many reforms in history tried to fix society…

But often, they only patched one hole — while creating another.

🧵 A Familiar Pattern

Take the rise of industrial labor reforms:

✔ They improved workers’ rights
✔ They regulated working hours
✔ They increased wages

But they also led to:

⚙️ Increased production pressure
🌍 Environmental strain
📉 New forms of inequality through global competition

A solution… that created new problems.

⚠️ The Cost of “Fixing” the World

Throughout history, even meaningful reforms were pursued through:

⚔️ Wars (hot & cold)
🔥 Uprisings
🗡 Rebellions
⛓ Sanctions
🕵️ Secret societies
⛪ Religious conflicts

We honor the courage behind these efforts.

But we must also admit:

👉 The means often worsened the ends.

🌍 The Hard Truth Today

Despite technological advancement:

🔥 Wars are more destructive
💸 Inequality is wider than ever
📉 Poverty persists at scale
🔐 Freedoms are increasingly restricted
🌡 Environmental threats are rising

It is fair to say:

⚠️ In many ways, things have worsened.

🧠 A Smarter Approach to Reform

What if reform focused on BOTH:

✔ The end goal
✔ The means used to get there

What if we could:

⚖️ Minimize side-effects
🔄 Maintain system equilibrium
🌱 Transform without destruction

✨ The LaaS / Homocracy Strategy

LaaS — Leadership as a Service
Homocracy — Governance by Equals

This model introduces a long-term support system by:

🛡 Containing broken systems without violently breaking them
🔄 Gradually transforming how resources are managed
🤝 Promoting cooperation instead of confrontation

🚀 How It Will Be Done

1️⃣ Proof of Concept

🏢 Laastras — Leadership as a Service Trade System

A private-sector vehicle that demonstrates a working alternative.

2️⃣ Knowledge & Influence

📚 Launch of a magazine:

“Leadership as a Service”

To:

🧠 Educate
📢 Promote
🤝 Engage existing powers

🌱 The Goal

A system that does not:

🚫 Tear everything down
🚫 Create new unintended crises

But instead:

✔ Builds stability
✔ Preserves balance
✔ Enables lasting transformation

💡 Final Thought

The future does not need another temporary fix.

It needs a long-term support system.

#LaaS #Homocracy #Laastras #SystemReform #SustainableChange #FutureGovernance #MutualProvision #LongTermThinking





  1. Change Is Inevitable



🌍 LaaS / Homocracy Change Is Round the Corner

Sometimes, a journey begins with a word…

Back in October 2014, we set out to change the system.

We had a destination in mind — a bold one:

✨ “Laaszen – Leadership as a Service World Citizenship Nation”

But we did not yet fully understand the path.

🧠 The Birth of an Idea

We coined the term:

“LaaS — Leadership as a Service”

At the time, we knew one thing for sure:

💻 Technology was the ant’s pants — the key to transforming systems.

After years in Communication, Software Engineering, and Networks, we sensed its power.

Yet, LaaS would later reveal a far deeper meaning than we first imagined.

🏛 The Upgrade: Homocracy

By November 2015, another concept emerged:

“Homocracy — Governance by Equals”

An evolution beyond Democracy.

Because from early on, we had witnessed its tragic limitations and failures.

🏜 A Journey Through Fire

Between 2016 and 2017, life took a dramatic turn.

I crossed the Sahara Desert — from Annaba, Algeria to Niger — after months of personal ordeal.

🌍 In Niger, I was supported by IOM
🏠 Eventually, I returned home to Bujumbura, Burundi

Through it all…

🧠 The meditation on LaaS / Homocracy continued.

📖 From Vision to Blueprint

That reflection led to writing:

📘 “World Federal Government Constitution” (2020)
👉 https://files.fm/f/u82mjfch3f

At the height of COVID-19, the vision took structured form.

💔 Trials Along the Way

Between 2021 and late 2025, I faced a chronic illness.

It worsened over time.

But:

❤️ My family stood by me
🙏 We found a way through

Even in hardship, the vision did not stop growing.

📘 A Clearer Blueprint

By late 2025, another milestone was reached:

📗 “Homocracy and Digital Public Infrastructure”
👉 https://files.fm/f/ywe7bh266q

A concrete blueprint for an equality-centered World Federal Government.

🚀 The Present Moment

Now, looking back over 12 years…

We see clarity, maturity, and direction.

The system is no longer just an idea.

It has a vehicle:

🏢 Laastras
👉 https://mwambaro.github.io

🌱 Why I Say This With Confidence

So when I say:

✨ “LaaS / Homocracy Change Is Round the Corner”

…it is not wishful thinking.

It is earned conviction.

Because along the journey, I have met strategic friends — people who may help steer this vision to its destination.

I call them all:

🌟 “Naziha”

May all the powers for Good in the universe rally behind them.

💡 Final Thought

Some journeys take time.

But when vision, resilience, and purpose align…

🌍 Change becomes inevitable.

#LaaS #Homocracy #Laastras #SystemChange #FutureGovernance #WorldFederalGovernment #Resilience #Vision #ChangeIsComing



  1. Change the Game — Not the Players



🔄 Change the Governance Game—Not the Players

⚽ We often treat governance like soccer—swap the players, hope for a different score.

But governance is not a game of players. It is a game of systems.

🚗 Think of a self-driving car.
There is no “great driver” inside. No elite talent required.
All you do is issue commands within the system’s limits—and it performs.

Why? Because engineers already built a powerful, intelligent system beneath it.

👉 Governance should work the same way.

With a strong, resilient, purpose-driven system, leadership becomes operational—not heroic.
Even a child could lead within a well-designed system.

❓ So… why does governance even exist?

Throughout history, people have felt the choking grip of governments—
and repeatedly tried to overthrow or replace them.

This raises a deeper question:

👉 Why should governments exist at all?

They often feel heavy, slow, restrictive… even suffocating.

🌍 The Answer: Shared Resources

Governments must exist because we live on shared resources.

Everything that sustains human life—
land, water, energy, infrastructure, knowledge—
is fundamentally shared.

Without coordination:
➡️ Chaos
➡️ Inefficiency
➡️ Inequality

With proper management:
➡️ Optimization
➡️ Fair distribution
➡️ Collective progress

👉 Therefore:

Raison d’être of Governance = Shared Resources

🎯 The True Purpose of Governance

Governments should have ONE core mission:

👉 Manage and distribute life-supporting resources to all humans.

Nothing more. Nothing less.

When governance stays within this boundary:
✔️ It stops being oppressive
✔️ It stops being bloated
✔️ It becomes efficient, predictable, and fair

⚙️ Reimagining Governance

This is where:

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

come in.

They redefine governance around one central pillar:

🧠 Morshux — Management of Resources that Support Human Existence

🔄 A New Economic Layer

To operationalize this:

🔹 SerX (Services Exchange)
A service-centered system where value is created through contribution—not just currency.

🔹 VirCu (Virtual Currency)
A flexible layer (like modern DeFi) enabling personal creativity and economic freedom.

Each individual operates within their:

🧩 Porshux — Portion of Resources that Support Human Existence

🚀 The Big Idea

Stop obsessing over who leads.

Start designing systems that lead themselves.

Because when the system is right:
👉 Leadership becomes simple
👉 Governance becomes light
👉 Society becomes free

🔥 Final Thought

Don’t change the players.
Change the game.

#ChangeTheGame #GovernanceReimagined #LeadershipAsAService #Homocracy #SharedResources #FutureOfGovernance #SystemsThinking #DeFi #Innovation #AfricaRising #VirCu #VirtualCurrency #LaaS





  1. Unjust Competitive Trade System



💥 The Competitive Trade System Is Broken

🏪 Every year, countless businesses are born.
And just a few years later… they disappear.

At first, they thrive. 📈
Then suddenly—💣 competition crushes them.

⚖️ The Harsh Reality

In most economies:

🔹 The majority are retailers, resellers, and small tradespeople
🔹 They fight daily for limited customers
🔹 They settle for shrinking revenues
🔹 They struggle just to survive

Meanwhile…

🏢 A few giant players dominate the system
➡️ Expanding endlessly
➡️ Absorbing markets
➡️ Pushing everyone else out

👉 The result?
A system where only a few win—and most are forced to lose.

🧭 The Hidden Problem

Most people enter business blindly.

❌ No reliable data
❌ No clear understanding of demand
❌ No visibility into market saturation

It’s not just competition.

👉 It’s a broken system design.

🌐 A New Model: System Over Competition

This is where:

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

introduce a global transformation.

🏛️ WTSC — The Game Changer

🌍 WTSC (World Trade System Consortium)

A central global institution made of country-level entities that:

✔️ Administer Laastras in each country
✔️ Enforce LaaS/Homocracy constitutions
✔️ Oversee national trade ecosystems

🔄 Rebuilding Trade Itself

WTSC operates through two key systems:

🔹 SerX (Services Exchange)
A system where investments are targeted and channelled to:
➡️ Fully manage life-supporting resources
➡️ Ensure equitable distribution

🔹 VirCu (Virtual Currency)
A flexible economic layer enabling innovation and personal growth

🧩 The Human Outcome

Every individual receives:

👉 Porshux — their rightful portion of life-supporting resources

Meaning:
✔️ Basic needs are secured
✔️ Dignity is restored
✔️ Survival is no longer a competition

📊 Powered by Global Intelligence

Because WTSC is global:

🌐 Trade data flows across countries

This enables:

⚖️ Load-balancing of supply and demand
📉 Elimination of market saturation
📈 Optimized resource allocation

🚀 The Result

❌ No destructive competition
❌ No forced business failures
❌ No extreme inequality

✔️ Balanced markets
✔️ Inclusive prosperity
✔️ A system where everyone wins

🔥 Final Thought

The problem is not the people.
It’s the system they are forced to play in.

❓ Let’s Talk

What system is the most broken in your country and how can LaaS/Homocracy fix it?

#TradeReform #BrokenSystem #LaaS #Homocracy #WTSC #SerX #VirCu #EconomicJustice #SystemsThinking #FutureOfWork





  1. Data-driven Insightful Educational System



🎓 Questioning the Educational System

📚 For centuries, education has been like a vast sea…
🌊 And students are left to navigate it blindly.

Governments attempt to guide them—
🎯 Assigning tracks based on broad generalizations

But here’s the truth:

❌ No real data-driven insight
❌ No precise alignment with real-world needs
❌ No guarantee of meaningful outcomes

⚠️ The Outcome We All See

📊 Over 60% of graduates end up:
➡️ Unemployed
➡️ Struggling in unrelated fields
➡️ Retailers or resellers—if lucky

At the same time:

📊 Over 40% of the population with little or no education:
➡️ Survive through menial work
➡️ Live without stability or growth

👉 Two broken paths. One broken system.

🤔 The Deeper Question

These realities force a critical reflection:

👉 Is the problem education… or governance itself?

Because education does not exist in isolation.
It is a direct output of how we organize society.

⚙️ A System That Sees Clearly

This is where:

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

redefine the entire equation.

🏛️ The 4 Core Institutions

A functioning, data-driven system emerges through:

🧠 HDN (Human Demography & Nutrition)
→ Understands population needs and human potential

🌍 WTSC (World Trade System Consortium)
→ Aligns global and national economic demand

🏭 CTP (Chain of Transformation & Production)
→ Maps production systems and workforce needs

⚖️ IFaSS (International Fair Social System)
→ Ensures fairness, inclusion, and social balance

🔗 Powered by Digital Intelligence

💻 With Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI):

📊 Real-time data flows across all institutions
📍 Exact positions needing to be filled are identified
🎯 Education becomes targeted—not guessed

🎯 Education with Purpose

Every student is trained with one goal:

👉 Employment and meaningful contribution

No more blind paths.
No more wasted potential.

❓ Why Isn’t This Done Today?

Because governance is…

⚠️ Presumptuous
⚠️ Distracted
⚠️ Focused on problems created by its own broken design

🔄 The Turning Point

When governance is vindicated—

👉 Focused solely on mutual provision
(Managing and distributing life-supporting resources)

Then:

✔️ Noise disappears
✔️ Clarity emerges
✔️ Data drives decisions

And education finally aligns with reality.

🧩 The Laastras Connection

These institutions are mirrored by:

🔹 Jobperon / Chaperon → HDN
🔹 GetClientele → IFaSS
🔹 AORI → CTP
🔹 eCard Wireless → WTSC

🚀 Final Thought

We don’t need to fix students.
We need to fix the system that guides them.

  1. LaaS / Homocracy Expounded



☁️ Expounding the Meaning of LaaS / Homocracy

💡 What if governance worked like software?

We already understand:

→ No installs
→ No heavy setup
→ Just subscribe and use—delivered via the cloud

🔄 Enter LaaS

🚀 LaaS (Leadership as a Service) applies the same idea to society.

Instead of software in the cloud, we build a cloud-like trade system:

🌐 SerX (Services Exchange)

At its core:

🧠 Morshux — Management of Resources that Support Human Existence

👤 Your Role in LaaS

Every adult individual:

✔️ Receives training
✔️ Subscribes to SerX / Morshux
✔️ Occupies one role in the system

🎁 In return, they receive:

👉 Porshux — their portion of life-supporting resources

Meaning:
✔️ Food
✔️ Shelter
✔️ Healthcare
✔️ Dignity

All guaranteed.

🎨 Freedom Beyond Survival

To preserve creativity and ambition:

💰 VirCu (Virtual Currency)
→ A decentralized layer like DeFi (Decentralized Finance)

With VirCu:

🎯 Individuals build, trade, and innovate
🎯 Craftsmanship thrives
🎯 Comfort and prosperity expand beyond basics

🏛️ Homocracy (Governance by Equals) is the system that runs LaaS.

It is anchored in one immutable truth:

📜 Raison d’être of Governance = Shared Resources

🎯 Purpose of Governance:
→ Manage and distribute resources that support human existence

Nothing more. Nothing less.

🧠 HDN — Human Demography & Nutrition
🌍 WTSC — World Trade System Consortium
🏭 CTP — Chain of Transformation & Production
⚖️ IFaSS — International Fair Social System

🤝 Equality by Design

Because everyone:

✔️ Plays one role
✔️ Receives equal Porshux

We achieve:

❌ No poverty
❌ No unemployment
❌ No systemic inequality
❌ No conflict over survival

✔️ Only contribution, balance, and dignity

  1. Invalidating Rulership Duration



⏳ How Long Should Leaders Stay in Power?

🌍 Around the world, leadership timelines vary wildly.

Some leaders:
➡️ Stay for decades
➡️ Become symbols of control
➡️ Face growing opposition over time

Others:
➡️ Rotate quickly
➡️ Struggle with continuity
➡️ Leave unfinished agendas

⚖️ The Endless Debate

Two opposing views dominate:

🟢 Long-term rule
✔️ Experience grows
✔️ Stability is maintained
✔️ Long-term plans can mature

🔴 Short-term rule
✔️ Fresh ideas emerge
✔️ Power is checked
✔️ Diverse talent participates

❗ The Hidden Truth

👉 Both models are flawed.

Whether:
🔁 Rotational
⏱️ Temporary
👑 Extended

All systems eventually run into:
❌ Power struggles
❌ Inefficiencies
❌ Instability or stagnation

🧠 The Real Problem

It’s not about how long leaders stay.

👉 It’s about the system beneath them.

⚙️ A System That Ends the Debate

Enter:

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

These redefine governance at its core.

🎯 Clarity of Governance

LaaS/Homocracy establishes:

📜 Raison d’être of Governance
→ Shared resources

🎯 Purpose of Governance
→ Manage and distribute resources that support human existence

🔄 Leadership Reimagined

In this system:

👤 Leadership is just another service
— like technical, managerial, or menial roles

So…

⏳ Whether a leader stays:
➡️ Short-term
➡️ Rotational
➡️ Long-term

👉 It no longer matters.

Because:

✔️ The system is robust

With LaaS/Homocracy:

  1. LaaS/Homocracy Will Last



🏛️ The Reform That Lasts and Works

💭 History has seen many reforms come and go.
Some spark hope… then fade away.

But a few last—because they solve something fundamental.

So here’s the question:

👉 What makes a reform truly last?

🔍 The Missing Piece

Most reforms fail because they:

❌ Treat symptoms, not root causes
❌ Patch systems instead of redesigning them
❌ Ignore the nature of human existence

⚙️ A Reform Built to Last

Enter:

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

A reform designed not just to improve systems—
👉 but to rebuild them from the ground up.

🧠 Reason #1: Built on TAToE

📜 TAToE (The Absolute Truth of Existence)

👉 Existence is governed by free will and mutual respect—
👉 not imposed authority.

From this:

🌐 Trade becomes the outermost container of human relations

Meaning:
✔️ All interactions are voluntary
✔️ Respect replaces force
✔️ Systems align with human nature

🎯 Reason #2: Governance Vindicated

LaaS/Homocracy revisits the core of governance:

📌 Raison d’être → Shared Resources
📌 Purpose → Manage & distribute life-supporting resources

With this clarity:

❌ Wars fade
❌ Conflicts reduce
❌ Unemployment disappears
❌ Poverty and malnutrition end
❌ Freedom is preserved

🔄 Reason #3: Trade Reimagined

From TAToE emerges a new system:

🔹 SerX (Services Exchange)

Where:

👤 Every adult has one role
🧠 Within Morshux (Management of Resources that Support Human Existence)

🎁 In return:

👉 Everyone receives what they need to live with dignity

✔️ No exclusion
✔️ No survival competition
✔️ No systemic inequality

🚀 Why This Reform Will Last

Because it:

✔️ Solves the root problem of humankind
✔️ Aligns with natural human principles
✔️ Builds a robust, fair, and free system
✔️ Centers equality in both governance and trade

🔥 Final Thought

Reforms don’t last because they are powerful.
They last because they are true.

👉 LaaS/Homocracy is built on that truth.

#Reform #LaaS #Homocracy #SystemsThinking #FutureOfGovernance #Equality #Innovation #TradeReimagined



  1. Defeat Dark Evil Forces Through LaaS/Homocracy



⚖️ Is LaaS / Homocracy Idealism… or Necessity?

🌍 Human history tells one clear story:

⚔️ A constant tension between Good and Evil

At times, it feels as though powerful dark forces push humanity toward:
➡️ Conflict
➡️ Corruption
➡️ Even extinction

🧠 A Deeper Observation

Yet… humanity still stands.

Why?

👉 Because forces of Good appear to operate under higher rules:

📜 Respect for free will
📜 Influence over coercion

If this were not true:

❌ Humanity would not have survived
❌ Progress would not exist

🤔 A Paradox Worth Noting

Some traditions claim:

👑 “Rulers are under the power of evil”

And yet…

✔️ Human rights have advanced
✔️ Societies have improved
✔️ Innovation has flourished

👉 Meaning?

Evil can be counterbalanced.

⚙️ The Missing Counter-Force

The real solution is not wishful thinking.

👉 It is SYSTEM DESIGN.

A governance system that is:

✔️ Resilient
✔️ Fair
✔️ Just
✔️ Equality-centered

A system rooted in principles of Good

🚀 Enter LaaS / Homocracy

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

Built on one core truth:

🌐 All life-supporting resources are shared

👉 Therefore, they must be:
✔️ Managed properly
✔️ Distributed equally

🔄 A New Trade Reality

LaaS/Homocracy transforms trade through:

🔹 SerX (Services Exchange)
→ A service-based system (not currency-first)

🔹 VirCu (Virtual Currency)
→ A decentralized layer enabling creativity (like DeFi)

Together:

✔️ Survival is guaranteed
✔️ Innovation is unleashed

🌱 From Idea to Implementation

This is not abstract.

🚀 Laastras already exists:
🔗 https://mwambaro.github.io

🏛️ A Practical Path Forward

We don’t need to destroy existing systems.

We introduce:

🏢 SPLAASM — Special Leadership as a Service Ministry/Department

An NGO-like national structure that:

➡️ Hosts Laastras locally
➡️ Connects globally
➡️ Forms a future UN organ
➡️ Enables a multi-polar World Federal Government

🔥 Final Thought

If humanity is to survive:

⚠️ Our own flawed nature
⚠️ External forces of evil

Then this is not idealism.

👉 It is necessity.

Do you still see LaaS/Homocracy as idealism… or as the system we urgently need?

  1. Coexistence of Equality and Efficiency

⚖️ Equality & Efficiency in LaaS / Homocracy

💭 Why do many governance systems feel… inefficient?

Because they spend most of their energy:

🔁 Fixing problems they created themselves

🧩 The Vicious Cycle

Current systems are trapped in their own design:

❌ Unemployment persists
❌ Poverty lingers
❌ Conflicts resurface

👉 These should have been solved long ago.

Instead:

⚠️ Systems manage them
⚠️ Leaders inherit them
⚠️ Society endures them

🏛️ An Outdated Model

Most governments still rely on:

🗳️ Representative Democracy

A model designed when:

📵 Technology was limited
📉 Power couldn’t be widely distributed

Today?

📡 We have Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI)
📊 We have Data Governance

Yet systems remain… outdated.

⚠️ Misplaced Effort

Governments often:

🚫 Interfere in personal morality
🚫 Regulate subjective offense
🚫 Create freedom entanglement

👉 Resulting in:

💥 Division
💥 Uprisings
💥 Endless debate cycles

⚙️ A Clean System Design

Enter:

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

A system that removes inefficiency at its root.

🎯 Focused Governance

LaaS/Homocracy reduces governance to ONE mission:

👉 Manage & distribute life-supporting resources

Nothing more.
Nothing less.

🤝 Equality by Architecture

Through:

📡 DPI + 📊 Data Governance

Power is:

✔️ Distributed across citizens
✔️ Transparent and data-driven
✔️ Free from centralized bottlenecks

Also:

🏢 Public + Private sectors are fused into one system

🚀 Real Efficiency, Real Outcomes

By fixing the system itself:

❌ War disappears
❌ Unemployment ends
❌ Poverty fades
❌ Malnutrition is eliminated
❌ Freedom is preserved

✔️ Effort becomes focused
✔️ Progress becomes continuous
✔️ Society becomes balanced

🌱 Not Just Theory

This is already taking shape:

🚀 Laastras — Proof of Concept
🔗 https://mwambaro.github.io

🏛️ Implementation Path

Each country hosts Laastras via:

🏢 SPLAASM — Special Leadership as a Service Ministry/Department

Globally:

🌍 SPLAASMs unite into a UN organ
→ Enabling worldwide coordination of resources

🔥 Final Thought

Efficiency is not about working harder.
It’s about removing what should never exist.

👉 LaaS/Homocracy does exactly that.

  1. The Two-Edged Strategy



🌍 Application of LaaS / Homocracy in Your Country

💡 How do we actually apply LaaS/Homocracy in real life?

Not by guesswork—
👉 but by understanding what must change.

🏛️ Step 1: Redefine Governance

The constitution must be rebuilt on:

📜 Raison d’être → Shared Resources
🎯 Purpose → Manage & distribute life-supporting resources

⚙️ Step 2: Establish the Core Engine

We introduce:

🧠 Morshux — Management of Resources that Support Human Existence

Implemented through:

🔄 SerX (Services Exchange)
→ A service-based trade system

🔗 Step 3: Fuse the Economy

To make this work:

🏢 Public sector + 🏬 Private sector → ONE integrated system

👉 No fragmentation
👉 No inefficiency

🚀 Step 4: Build the Entry Point

We start from both sides:

🔹 Private Sector

🚀 Laastras (Startup Vehicle)
→ Builds and deploys the system

🔹 Public Sector

🏛️ SPLAASM — Special Leadership as a Service Ministry/Department
→ Provides structure and coordination

⚔️ The Two-Edged Strategy

✔️ Launch Laastras first
✔️ Encourage government to establish SPLAASM

👉 Why both?

Because:

⏳ Governments may delay
⚡ Progress cannot wait

🌐 The Laastras Ecosystem

Laastras deploys 4 platforms mirroring core institutions:

🧠 Jobperon / Chaperon → HDN
⚖️ GetClientele → IFaSS
🌍 eCard Wireless → WTSC
🏭 AORI → CTP

📈 The Outcome

✔️ Immediate momentum via private sector
✔️ Structured scale via public sector
✔️ Seamless transition to full LaaS/Homocracy

🔥 Final Thought

Don’t wait for perfect conditions.
Build the system—and let it pull the future forward.

❓ Your Voice Matters

Do you have a different idea as to how LaaS/Homocracy should be applied in your country?

#LaaS #Homocracy #SystemDesign #Innovation #FutureOfGovernance #StartupEcosystem #PublicPrivatePartnership #Laastras





  1. Moments Where People “Click”



⏳ Why Real Reform Often Takes Generations

📖 “There will be a period of time when they will not put up with wholesome [information]… but will surround themselves with [story-tellers] to have their ears tickled.”

Striking, isn’t it?

🎭 The Reality We Live In

Today:

🌍 Big issues like:
❌ Unemployment
❌ War & conflict
❌ Poverty & malnutrition
❌ Freedom disruption

…are seen as too big, too complex, too distant.

👉 So people switch off.

🧠 The Subtle Shift

After repeated failed attempts to solve them:

⚠️ Urgency fades
⚠️ Comfort zones take over
⚠️ Serious problems feel… normal

Meanwhile:

✨ “Exciting stories” win attention
📈 Consumption rises
🎯 Focus shifts away from real reform

🚧 The Real Barrier

The challenge isn’t just solving problems.

👉 It’s making people feel them again.

We must:

🔍 Break big issues into daily realities
💡 Create moments where people “click”
📣 Tell stories that connect, not distract

⚙️ Enter LaaS / Homocracy

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

A complete system designed to:

✔️ Solve root societal problems
✔️ Restore efficiency and balance
✔️ Align governance with real human needs

⏳ Why It Takes Time

Because:

🧠 Minds must shift
💬 Conversations must evolve
🏛️ Institutions must adapt

👉 This doesn’t happen overnight.

It may take:

📆 Years… even decades

🌟 The Good News

We’re not stuck.

✨ The project is flexible
✨ The message is adaptable
✨ The entry points are many

👉 We can:

📣 Spark curiosity
🔥 Ignite debate
💡 Create “click” moments everywhere

🚀 Already in Motion

💼 Laastras — the startup vehicle

✔️ Built with a powerful narrative
✔️ Adaptable to diverse audiences
✔️ Ready to scale across countries

🤝 Your Role

👥 Volunteer • 📢 Evangelist • 💻 Software Engineer • 🤝 Co-Founder

📧 onkezabahizi@gmail.com

🌍 Represent your country. Shape the future.

🔥 Final Thought

Real reform doesn’t fail because it’s wrong.
It delays because minds need time to catch up.

  1. The System That Lives Forever



♾️ A Strong Governance System That Will Last Forever

💭 “Forever” may sound far-fetched…

But pause for a moment.

🌌 Two Ways to See the Future

There are two dominant views:

🔬 Chance-based universe → Often pessimistic about the future
✨ Purpose-driven universe → Deeply optimistic about continuity

🧠 A Simple Observation

Science agrees on one thing:

👉 The universe had a beginning

So the real question becomes:

👉 Was it random… or intentional?

🔍 Signs Pointing to Purpose

Many realities around us suggest intentional design:

🚀 Space exploration — revealing order and structure in the cosmos
🌍 Life on Earth — uniquely sustained conditions
🪐 Earth’s position in the solar system — perfectly balanced
🧠 The human brain — unmatched complexity and capability
🧬 Seemingly unageing cells — continuous regeneration mechanisms
💭 Innate desire to live forever — deeply embedded in human nature
📖 Stories of golden ages — past and future visions of perfect living

👉 Together, they point to one idea:

A universe designed with “forever” in mind.

⚙️ Governance for a “Forever” Humanity

If we are here to last…

👉 Then our systems must also last.

Enter:

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

🧠 Built on an Absolute Principle

📜 TAToE (The Absolute Truth of Existence)

→ Reverse-engineers existence itself
→ Establishes a universal framework for:

✔️ Free will
✔️ Mutual respect
✔️ Harmonious coexistence

🌍 A System for All Civilizations

LaaS/Homocracy is:

✔️ Universal
✔️ Absolute
✔️ Adaptable to any intelligent, free-willed beings

👉 Not just for today… but for eternity.

❗ Why Past Reforms Fall Short

Despite progress, humanity still faces:

❌ War
❌ Unemployment
❌ Poverty
❌ Malnutrition
❌ Freedom disruption
❌ Conflict

👉 Proof that past systems, though helpful, are not strong enough to last forever

🚀 The Path Forward

We need a system that is:

✔️ Resilient
✔️ Fair
✔️ Equality-centered
✔️ Designed for infinite continuity

👉 That system is LaaS/Homocracy.

🔥 Final Thought

If humanity is built to last forever…
shouldn’t our governance system be built the same way?

❓ Your Take

Do you think LaaS/Homocracy is strong enough to last forever?

#LaaS #Homocracy #FutureOfGovernance #SystemsThinking #EternalDesign #Innovation #Equality #Humanity #TAToE





  1. The Role of Stories in Change



📖 Stories Are Powerful Enough to Induce Change

“Stories are the gatekeepers of history and civilization. They are used to shape the mind and move to actions. They educate kids and turn them into responsible adults. They were used long before writing became possible to keep information across generations. In fact, stories, instead of dying, give rise to tales which carry far in the future bits of information about life in the universe. Artists sing stories and paint them into vivid land marks.”

🌍 Why This Matters

Stories:

🧠 Shape minds
🔥 Ignite action
📚 Transmit knowledge across generations
🎨 Live through art, music, and culture

👉 That’s how change happens.

🚀 A Story in Motion

We have started a new story:

🔹 LaaS (Leadership as a Service)
🔹 Homocracy (Governance by Equals)

And we are:

📖 Writing books
🏢 Building Laastras (our startup vehicle)
📣 Sharing the vision far and wide

👉 The story is alive—and growing.

🔁 The Power of Repetition

There’s a psychological truth:

🧠 Repetition shapes belief
💡 Belief shapes action

The more a concept is repeated:

✔️ The more the mind accepts it
✔️ The more behavior aligns with it

🙏 A Parallel Insight

Think of prayer:

➡️ Repetition brings clarity
➡️ It energizes the mind
➡️ It creates momentum

👉 Whether divine response comes or not,
the transformation begins within.

🔥 Story as Momentum

By repeating LaaS/Homocracy:

📣 We create awareness
⚡ We spark curiosity
🎯 We drive action

👉 We are planting a narrative powerful enough to reshape society.

🌱 From Story to Reality

This is not just talk.

🚀 Laastras already exists as the vehicle of change

✔️ Structured
✔️ Planned
✔️ Ready to scale

They create it.
